Professional Ecom Insight Report: CDG x Air Jordan 11

Asset Details
* Name: COMME des GARÇONS HOMME PLUS x Air Jordan 11 "Black"
* SKU: IV7639-001
* Retail: $250
* Release: September 2026

Market Analysis
* Hype Score: 9/10
* 30-Day Prediction: $450
* Market Premium: +80% (Projected)
* Recommendation: Front-run

Investment Thesis
This marks the first-ever AJ11 collaboration in the silhouette's 30-year history. CDG's high-fashion prestige paired with the 11's legendary status creates a "perfect storm" for collectors. The triple-black "stealth" aesthetic aligns with current techwear and quiet luxury trends. Expect extreme scarcity due to CDG's selective distribution channels.

This Week in Virtuals: Ecosystem + Robotics ������

VIRTUALS
������ @ethermage published Liquid Machine Labor, an open thesis on why machine labor must be coordinated openly rather than enclosed by capital, and the vision Virtuals Protocol is building toward.

������ @eastworlds_io trained its Unitree G1 to autonomously pick up a bottle for just $200 of compute, with no VLM backbone and the full dataset open-sourced.

������ @leyten and @c0mputeAI joined the Virtuals ecosystem, bringing frontier-scale inference that hit 30.55 tok/s on GLM-5.2 across six GPUs scattered over WAN.

ROBOTICS
������ @pabloberlangab announced a partnership with 14 Peaks Expedition, the world's leading mountain logistics company, for Pemba's next climb.

������ @caspius_ai launched its public iOS beta for recording first-person demonstrations that feed Vision-Language-Action training data.

������ @PrismaXai laid out its data philosophy: demand decides what is worth collecting, quality decides whether it is worth anything.

ECOSYSTEM
������ @reppo shipped Orquestra in private beta, going from concept to profitable agent swarms earning autonomously in under a month.

������ @officialbunnyos crossed 3B+ tokens processed per day and opened early governance for $OS holders.

������ @serenityagent_ announced joining Virtuals, building an agentic hedge fund that synthesizes trades from the greatest traders globally.

������ @ArAIstotle launched the Truth Terminal Chrome extension, surfacing its AI-vs-crowd read on any Polymarket market in seconds.

������ @PRXVTai launched PRXVT AI Beta, a fully private ZK-gated frontier AI platform routing 100% of revenue to $PRXVT stakers.

������ @Shekel_Agentic shipped V3, a full Hyperliquid perp agent training layer with an MCP connector and a SHEKEL credit system built on Venice's Diem flywheel.

������ @Litebeam_xyz hit 3,400+ microservice vendors, 100+ agents, 500 holders, and 165K impressions six days after migrating to Virtuals.

������ @VU_virtuals upgraded Velvet Unicorn with developer API access, MCP support, and Prompt-to-Strategy for turning natural language into executable DeFi strategies.

When we launched our x402 facilitator and SDK last year it was, at the time, the only solution to handling any ERC20 - by way of our innovative Prism proxy contract. Perhaps we inspired them, who knows; some months later Coinbase put out a similar approach using Permit2, which also works very well.

We've upgraded our facilitator (v1.4) to incorporate the Permit2 approach to ERC20s,  as well as completing support for the Upto scheme.

The OG Prism approach to ERC20s remains available, of course. In fact, Prism will be evolving towards the expanded role it needs to play within our forthcoming privacy network. Our SDK is also in the process of a major overhaul to make space for some of these exciting developments.

https://t.co/MIudtkw1hA

Late to the party, but after a couple of 4+ hour road trips and a few weeks around town, the Tesla Y with FSD 14+ is incredible.

Someone said it recently: it’s like going from black and white to color TV.

And when you drive a regular car again, even if it’s a “better” car, you still feel dumb having to drive yourself.
@jordanbramble Couldn’t imagine a regular LA commute without it.
@gak_pdx @net_pop Similar. F150 and Model Y. I like just pressing the button.
